case_title: BANK OF AMERICA, N.A. VS. EDWARD W KIM et al

docket_entries.description: COMMON COUNTS/OPEN BOOK ACCOUNT/COLLECTIONS, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF BANK OF AMERICA, N.A. AS TO DEFENDANT KIM, EDWARD W DOES 1 TO 20, INCLUSIVE SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR SEP-24-2014 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  JUN-20-2014 CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENT DUE ON         SEP-02-2014
TRIAL CONCLUDED. IN 0.4 DAYS

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF BANK OF AMERICA, N.A. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT KIM, EDWARD W $118,897.52 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $118,897.52, PLUS INTEREST THEREON AT THE NOTE RATE OF 9.75 PER ANNUM FROM MARCH 18, 2014 THROUGH THE DATE OF TRIAL, JANUARY 20, 2015. ATTORNEY FEES AND COSTS TO BE DETERMINED BY SUBSEQUENT MOTION. SEE SCANNED DOC

MASTER SHORT CAUSE CALENDAR OF JAN-20-2015 ASSIGNED TO SHORT CAUSE TRIAL CALENDAR ON JAN-20-2015 AT 10:03 AM IN DEPT. 608, JUDGE GARRETT L. WONG. TRIAL TIME ESTIMATE: 1 DAY. JUDGE: JOHN K. STEWART; CLERK: JIROQUE; COURT REPORTER: MATTER NOT REPORTED. (206)
MINUTES FOR JAN-20-2015 10:03 AM

ASSIGNED TO DEPT. 608 FOR SHORT CAUSE COURT TRIAL ON JAN-20-2015. WITNESSES SWORN AND EXAMINED. EVIDENTIARY DOCUMENTATION INTRODUCED AND ADMITTED. THE COURT RULES IN FAVOR OF PLAINTIFF AND DIRECTS PLTF'S COUNSEL TO PREPARE AND SUBMIT A PROPOSED FORM OF JUDGMENT, APPROVED AS TO FORM. PLTF'S COUNSEL STATES THE PARTIES WILL CONTINUE IN ONGOING SETTLEMENT DISCUSSIONS. REMOVED FROM SHORT CAUSE TRIAL CALENDAR ON JAN-20-2015. ALL JOINT TRIAL EXHIBITS ARE RETURNED TO COUNSEL. JUDGE GARRETT L. WONG, CLERK: V. MACK, NOT REPORTED (D608)
